title: Small Modern Desk (or Keyboard Stand)
summary: A minimal 2x2-legged stand with a plank top and a lower shelf — small enough to work as a keyboard stand, tall enough to double as a compact desk.
description:
Four 2x2 legs, joined by short leg aprons at the top of each pair, form the whole structural frame — a single 2x2 center support running between the two leg pairs is what keeps a stand this narrow from racking side to side. Build the leg-and-apron frame first, then add the center support before anything else goes on.

The top is two 1x8 boards run edge to edge, and the lower shelf is two 1x6 boards the same way — both simple flat assemblies that attach directly to the frame. **This is genuinely the same build whether it ends up as a keyboard stand or a small desk** — the only real difference is what gets set on top of it.

Assemble with pocket holes if a jig is on hand, or fall back to self-tapping construction screws — either works fine at this scale.

materials.name: Pocket hole screws, 2-1/2", or self-tapping star bit screws, 2-1/2"
Primer and paint, or stain and poly

steps.title: Cut all the parts
steps.body: Cut four legs at 29-1/4", four leg aprons at 11" and one center support at 32" from the 2x2. Cut two top boards at 36" from the 1x8. Cut two bottom shelf boards at 35" from the 1x6. Allowing about 1/8" for each saw cut, that comes to three 8 ft 2x2, two 6 ft 1x8 and one 6 ft 1x6. Square every cut and label each piece as it comes off the saw.

steps.title: Build the leg frames
steps.body: Assemble the legs and leg aprons into two matching leg-frame pairs.
materials: Pocket hole screws, 2-1/2", or self-tapping star bit screws, 2-1/2"

steps.title: Add the center support
steps.body: Attach the center support between the two leg-frame pairs.
materials: Pocket hole screws, 2-1/2", or self-tapping star bit screws, 2-1/2"

steps.title: Attach the top and shelf
steps.body: Attach the two top boards and the two lower shelf boards to the frame.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Small modern desk or keyboard stand
